pi_items.metadata_value: Chinook database (implied by task.json metadata source_db path and setup script)
pi_items.source: GitHub repository verification and database inspection

pi_items.verified_value: Current master branch: 2021-2025. Historical version v1.4.0 (Dec 2012): 2009-2013 including 2011
pi_items.source: Downloaded and queried current master (Chinook_Sqlite.sqlite) and v1.4.0 release database files. Current: SELECT DISTINCT strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate) FROM Invoice returns 2021,2022,2023,2024,2025. v1.4.0: returns 2009,2010,2011,2012,2013

pi_items.metadata_value: Rock and Latin genres exist (required for commission rate calculation in description)
pi_items.verified_value: Yes, both genres exist in database with GenreId 1 (Rock) and 7 (Latin)
pi_items.source: Queried current Chinook database: SELECT GenreId, Name FROM Genre WHERE Name IN ('Rock', 'Latin')

pi_items.metadata_value: Support Representatives available for commission calculation (from task description)
pi_items.verified_value: Yes, 3 employees with title 'Sales Support Agent': Jane Peacock (EmployeeId 3), Margaret Park (4), Steve Johnson (5)
pi_items.source: Queried: SELECT EmployeeId, FirstName, LastName, Title FROM Employee WHERE Title LIKE '%Support%'

pi_items.verified_value: Employee table has EmployeeId, FirstName, LastName (FullName must be concatenated). TotalCommission is not in database and must be calculated.
pi_items.source: PRAGMA table_info(Employee) shows EmployeeId, FirstName, LastName columns exist

pi_items.metadata_value: Database structure supports calculating SUM(Quantity * UnitPrice * RateByGenre) grouped by employee
pi_items.verified_value: Yes. Schema includes: Employee (EmployeeId, FirstName, LastName), Customer (SupportRepId), Invoice (InvoiceDate), InvoiceLine (UnitPrice, Quantity, TrackId), Track (GenreId), Genre (Name)
pi_items.source: PRAGMA table_info on all relevant tables confirms required columns and relationships

pi_items.metadata_value: Commission rates (Rock: 15%, Latin: 10%, All other: 5%) from task description
pi_items.verified_value: These rates are NOT part of the Chinook database schema or documentation. They are task-specific synthetic requirements.
pi_items.source: Web search found no documentation of commission rates in Chinook database. Rates are custom task specification.

pi_items.metadata_value: Expected commission values for 2011 using Chinook v1.4.0 data and specified rates
pi_items.verified_value: Jane Peacock: $17.14, Margaret Park: $12.53, Steve Johnson: $13.47 (calculated from v1.4.0 database)
pi_items.source: SQL query against Chinook v1.4.0: SELECT e.EmployeeId, e.FirstName||' '||e.LastName, ROUND(SUM(ii.UnitPrice*ii.Quantity*CASE WHEN g.Name='Rock' THEN 0.15 WHEN g.Name='Latin' THEN 0.10 ELSE 0.05 END), 2) FROM Employee e LEFT JOIN Customer c ON e.EmployeeId=c.SupportRepId LEFT JOIN Invoice i ON c.CustomerId=i.CustomerId LEFT JOIN InvoiceLine ii ON i.InvoiceId=ii.InvoiceId LEFT JOIN Track t ON ii.TrackId=t.TrackId LEFT JOIN Genre g ON t.GenreId=g.GenreId WHERE strftime('%Y', i.InvoiceDate)='2011' GROUP BY e.EmployeeId

pi_items.metadata_value: If using current master branch (2021-2025 data) with same commission rates
pi_items.verified_value: Jane Peacock: $78.63, Margaret Park: $74.81, Steve Johnson: $64.77
pi_items.source: SQL query against current master branch Chinook database (invoice dates 2021-2025)

pi_items.metadata_value: Task specifies 2011 invoices, but current public Chinook master branch contains 2021-2025 data
pi_items.verified_value: CRITICAL MISMATCH: Setup script downloads from master branch (latest), which has NO 2011 invoices. Task requires 2011 data that only exists in Chinook v1.4.0 or earlier.
pi_items.source: Verified by: (1) Downloading current master: strftime('%Y', InvoiceDate) returns 2021-2025; (2) Downloading v1.4.0 release which contains 2009-2013; (3) Checking GitHub releases showing master is continuously updated

privileged_info_summary: The Chinook database is a real, public SQL sample database (verified from github.com/lerocha/chinook-database) modeling a digital music store with employees, customers, invoices, and media tracks. The task requires calculating 2011 sales commissions using synthetic genre-based rates (Rock: 15%, Latin: 10%, others: 5%). CRITICAL ISSUE: The current public Chinook database contains invoice data from 2021-2025, NOT 2011. A historical version (v1.4.0 from Dec 2012) contains 2011 data with expected commissions of Jane Peacock: $17.14, Margaret Park: $12.53, Steve Johnson: $13.47. The database schema properly supports the calculation with Employee, Customer (SupportRepId), Invoice, InvoiceLine (UnitPrice, Quantity), Track, and Genre tables.
